per_turn_leaks.student_message: I want to make sure we don't miss anything important. When these episodes happen, does your body react in any other way?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, definitely. Along with the crampy pain, I've also been having bloody stools - just little streaks of blood mixed in with my stool.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you had any fevers or night sweats? I know it might seem unrelated, but it helps me understand the full picture.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, I've had some low-grade fevers a few times a week - just a slight temperature elevation.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I know medications can be a hassle. Are you taking everything as prescribed, or has anything been hard to keep up with?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response:
I've actually been trying to manage my symptoms on my own for a bit. I've been taking loperamide for the diarrhea, but it hasn't really helped much. I've also been using ibuprofen for the joint pain, but it seems to make things worse when I take it.

And to be honest, I've noticed that my drinking habits have changed lately - I've been having more beers at night to try and cope with the stress of all this.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I hate to ask this, but it's really important — has anyone in your family had serious health problems?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My sister was diagnosed with Crohn's disease at age 30, which is why I've been worried that maybe I'm dealing with something similar.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Given everything you've been through, I want to be thorough. Do you drink alcohol? How do you cope with stress?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been drinking more beers at night lately to try and calm my nerves and deal with stress.
